# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
  - name: 'project'
    type: 'googleapis.com/Project'
    properties:
      projectId: '[PROJECT_ID]'

  - name: 'serviceAccountKey'
    type: 'googlecloudplatform::security::iam::ServiceAccountKey'
    properties:
      serviceAccount: '[SERVICE_ACCOUNT]@[PROJECT_ID].iam.gserviceaccount.com'
      iamCredentialsFilePath: 'keys/credentials.json'

  - name: 'computeNetwork'
    type: 'googleapis.com/ComputeNetwork'
    properties:
      projectId: '[PROJECT_ID]'
      networkName: 'default'
      autoCreateSubnetworks: True

  - name: 'subnetwork'
    type: 'googleapis.com/ComputeSubnetwork'
    properties:
      parent: 'projects/[PROJECT_ID]/regions/us-central1/networks/default'
      subnetworkName: 'my-subnetwork'
      ipCidrRange: '10.0.0.0/28'

  - name: 'instanceTemplate'
    type: 'googleapis.com/ComputeInstanceTemplate'
    properties:
      projectId: '[PROJECT_ID]'
      instanceTemplateName: 'my-instance-template'
      machineType: 'n1-standard-1'
      serviceAccount: '[SERVICE_ACCOUNT]@[PROJECT_ID].iam.gserviceaccount.com'
      disks:
        - boot: True
          autoDelete: True
          initializeParams:
            sourceImage: 'debian-cloud/debian-9'
      networkInterfaces:
        - name: 'global'
          accessConfigs:
            - name: 'External NAT'
              type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
          network: 'projects/[PROJECT_ID]/regions/us-central1/networks/default'

  - name: 'instanceGroup'
    type: 'googleapis.com/ComputeInstanceGroupManager'
    properties:
      projectId: '[PROJECT_ID]'
      zone: 'us-central1-a'
      instanceGroupName: 'my-instance-group'
      namedPorts:
        - name: 'http'
          port: 80
      version: 'v1'
      template: '[INSTANCE_TEMPLATE]'
      instancesConcurrencyPolicy: ALLOW_ANY

  - name: 'lbForwardingRule'
    type: 'googleapis.com/ComputeLoadBalancerForwardingRule'
    properties:
      projectId: '[PROJECT_ID]'
      region: 'us-central1'
      loadBalancerName: 'my-loadbalancer'
      frontendPort: 80
      backendServiceName: '[BACKEND_SERVICE]'

  - name: 'backendService'
    type: 'googleapis.com/ComputeBackendService'
    properties:
      projectId: '[PROJECT_ID]'
      region: 'us-central1'
      backendServiceName: '[BACKEND_SERVICE]'
      healthChecks:
        - '[HEALTH_CHECK]'
      backends:
        - group: '[INSTANCE_GROUP]'

  - name: 'cloudSqlInstance'
    type: 'googleapis.com/SQLDatabaseInstance'
    properties:
      projectId: '[PROJECT_ID]'
      zone: 'us-central1-a'
      databaseVersion: 'POSTGRES_12'
      rootPassword: 'your-password'
      instanceId: 'my-cloudsql-instance'
      tier: db-f1-micro

  - name: 'databaseUser'
    type: 'googleapis.com/SQLDatabaseUser'
    properties:
      parent: 'projects/[PROJECT_ID]/instances/my-cloudsql-instance'
      userName: 'my-user'
      password: 'your-password'

  - name: 'database'
    type: 'googleapis.com/SQLDatabase'
    properties:
      parent: 'projects/[PROJECT_ID]/instances/my-cloudsql-instance/databases'
      databaseName: 'my-database'

  - name: 'bucket'
    type: 'googleapis.com/StorageBucket'
    properties:
      projectId: '[PROJECT_ID]'
      bucketName: 'my-storage-bucket'
